## Model links (for local users)

**text_encoders**

- [qwen_3_4b.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/z_image_turbo/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/qwen_3_4b.safetensors)

**diffusion_models**

- [flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/black-forest-labs/FLUX.2-klein-4b-fp8/resolve/main/flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors)

**vae**

Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 text_encoders/
│   │      └── qwen_3_4b.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 diffusion_models/
│   │      └── flux-2-klein-4b-fp8.safetensors
│   └── 📂 vae/
│          └── flux2-vae.safetensors
```

## Report issues

Note: please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud will be updated after the stable release; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the next stable release.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)


FLUX.2 Klein (9B and 4B) is designed for a
base resolution of 1024x1024, supporting up to 4MP (e.g., 2048x2048). For optimal results and efficiency, start at
and use multiples of 16 for any custom resolutions. 
Recommended Settings for Flux 2 Klein:

    Ideal Base Resolution:
    (square),
    (portrait), or
    (landscape).
    Optimal Performance Range: 1MP to 2MP ensures high-quality results without exceeding optimal VRAM usage.
    Maximum Quality: Up to 4MP (2048x2048 or equivalent pixels).
    Aspect Ratios: Supports various formats including 1:1, 16:9, 3:2, 4:3, 5:4, 9:16, 2:3, 3:4, and 4:5.
    Tips:
        Speed/Prototyping (4B): 512–768 px on the short edge.
        Quality/Final Rendering (9B): 1024–1536 px base, then upscale.
        Upscaling: Use SD Ultimate Upscaler to achieve 4048px or higher.

groups.title: Multiple input example（Select all nodes then Ctrl-B to enable/disable）

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: high quality photo of this bustling street scene, remove text overlay

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: remove the model from image 2 then place him climbing the light poie, make the crowd of people in the scene look at the man from image 2 climbing the pole from image 1

[Master Style] --ar 4:5 --style raw --s 750 Photorealistic night street photography, high fidelity, sharp focus, wet asphalt reflections, cinematic lighting from overhead street lamps and vehicle headlights.

[Subject & Composition] --ar 4:5 --style raw --s 750 Nighttime intersection scene, featuring two Jamaican figures near the corner island where scattered trash litter the wet pavement. Yellow curb lines mark the crosswalk island. Two white vehicles are parked further down the street; one has headlights on, another is moving away with bright taillights. Closed storefronts with red rolling shutters line both sides of the street.

[Environment & Atmosphere] --ar 4:5 --style raw --s 750 Urban night environment, dimly lit by artificial sources including streetlights and car headlights, creating strong reflections on the wet road surface. Debris scattered across the ground, puddles reflecting light, atmosphere conveying quiet but messy aftermath — possibly post-event or cleanup scene.

[Specific Details to Capture] --ar 4:5 --style raw --s 750 Detailed elements include a makeshift vendor stall on the left sidewalk with Jamaican people gathered around it; signs reading “NO” and “Digital”;  The scene includes a utility pole with traffic signal arms overhead, power lines strung across the street, and distant building facades with signage including “Business”.

[Details to Remove, ignore, exclude]
time stamp overlay, watermark text at top left, at bottom left.

[Art Style Conversion] --ar 4:5 --style raw --s 750 Convert this realistic photo scene into a high-quality anime/manga illustration style. Keep the realistic lighting and textures but apply manga-style linework, vibrant colors, and simplified background details typical of a travel magazine cover or action figure book page — enhanced with bold shadows, exaggerated character proportions, and dynamic composition reminiscent of Japanese street photography posters or underground culture visuals.

[MASTER STYLE]
--ar 16:9 --style raw --s 850
Anime/Manga, high fidelity, sharp focus, dramatic motion blur

[SUBJECT & COMPOSITION]
--ar 9:16 --style raw --s 850
a dark toned Jamaican girl with short neat dreadlocks in a bomber jacket leaning against a wall, clean cel shading, bold graphic composition, 90s ranma era anime, film grain

[ARTISTIC TRANSFORMATION]
--ar 16:9 --style raw --s 850
Convert this photo scene into a high-quality Anime Manga illustration style. Vibrant lighting and textures, high-contrast manga-style linework, exaggerated character proportions, and dynamic composition. Enhance details with bold shadows and simplified background elements typical of a travel magazine cover or action figure book page.
